content.en:
This time, Ye Tian killed a total of four Holy Endowments, and from these four Holy Endowments, he obtained a total of seven Holy Relics, which shows how profound the Saint Endowment is.

Seven holy relics, even the battle gate will not be willing to give them to him.

"The parents of these four Saints will be furious when they know that they have fallen!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he is not afraid of retaliation.

Even the Supreme Domain Ancestor couldn't deduce his identity from the distant Dark Forbidden Domain.

Moreover, the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain did not dare to break into the Dark Sacred Domain, otherwise they would be looking for death!

The Dark Sanctuary has ten ancestors, if not more than ten.

In front of the Ancestor, the Supreme Domain Ancestor was also an ant, how could they dare to break into the Dark Sacred Domain to find his traces.

Moreover, those Supreme Domain Ancestors would never have imagined that he was not from the Dark Sacred Realm, but from some small realm.

So, he didn't worry about his safety in the slightest.

In addition to the holy relics, Ye Tian also found a lot of holy medicines, and even found thirteen ancestral medicines, the value of these ancestral medicines was unimaginable.

In addition, there are many other resources.

"Hey, what is this?"

Ye Tian found a special treasure in the internal space of the Black Pupil Holy Son, and this treasure was placed in the most core place, which was obviously very precious.

This treasure has been sealed layer by layer, and it is obviously not an ordinary treasure.

Ye Tian broke the ban and took out this treasure.

It is a piece of paper, but it is not an ordinary paper, but a paper of inheritance.

At the beginning, Ye Tian obtained the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Inheritance, which was also this kind of paper.

However, the inheritance paper obtained now seems to be the top inheritance paper.

This kind of inheritance paper is very expensive, and it basically records a very precious inheritance.

Ye Tian was curious, and his divine sense entered the inheritance paper to see what kind of inheritance it was.

Rumble!!!!

A word appeared in Ye Tian's consciousness.

"Ancestral !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"No, it's not the Ancestral Law, and it's an incomparably incomplete Ancestral Law. Ye Tian recognized it.

The inheritance here is at most only one-ten-thousandth of the Ancestor Method, and the flaws are still very large, such an Ancestor Method is not enough for a Superior Domain Ancestor to break through to the Ancestor level.

If you really cultivate such an Ancestor Method, you will eventually achieve a half-step Ancestor at most, and once you embark on the Ancestor Path, if you don't perfect this Ancestor Method, you will never be able to step into the Ancestor Realm.

But for those who have given up hope, it is better to cultivate such a crippled ancestor method and achieve a half-step ancestor, which is stronger than the peerless domain ancestor.

The only pity is that I will never be able to become the ancestor in the future, or there is countless times less hope.

And in the future, even if you are lucky and obtain a new complete ancestor method, you will not be able to break through to become an ancestor.

Therefore, unless they were in despair, there would generally be no superior domain ancestor who would not cultivate this kind of crippled ancestor method.

But even so, the value of this mutilated ancestor method is extremely high.

For example, Ye Tian could completely use this Incomplete Ancestor Method to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm.

"Imperial Ancestor Law!"

After Ye Tian comprehended for a while, he thoroughly understood the nature of this mutilated ancestor method, which was the imperial ancestor method.

For those who possess defensive holy endowments, this Imperial Ancestor Method is extremely precious.

"No wonder the Black Pupil Holy Son's defensive ability is very strong, he has practiced a variety of defensive domain techniques, and he has cultivated to the extreme level, which is no less than a small level defensive holy technique under the superposition. Before, he was still wondering how he had cultivated so many extreme level domain techniques, but now he understood! With this kind of mutilated ancestor method, it was not surprising that the strength of the Black Pupil Holy Son completely crushed the other saints. But now it's all cheap!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After obtaining the Broken Version of the Imperial Ancestor Method, he could cultivate the Holy Armor to the consummation realm.

"It's not suitable for cultivation here, I'll talk about it when I go back!"

Ye Tian put away this incomplete version of the Imperial Ancestor Method, and then checked the other treasures.

But there is no treasure comparable to this mutilated version of the Imperial Ancestor Law.

......

Dark Destruction Domain.

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor opened his eyes and had a premonition of something.

"What's it that makes me so flustered?"

He wanted to deduce something, but he couldn't, and it was clear that it was happening outside of the Dark Destruction Domain, so he couldn't figure it out.

"Could it be that something happened to my black pupils?"

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor panicked.

The more he thought about it, the more he felt that something was wrong, so he immediately left his palace, shuttled into the Dark Forbidden Realm, and then crossed the long distance at an extremely fast speed, and soon descended beyond the Holy Gold Realm.

"I've seen the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor!"

Several Supreme Domain Ancestors who were responsible for managing the matter of this genius's entry into the Saint Gold Realm greeted the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor one after another.

"Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor, why are you here suddenly?"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor asked curiously.

"I'm worried about my son!" said the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor truthfully.

"Hahaha, Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor, your heir, the Black Pupil Holy Son, is very powerful, and he has the protection of the Holy Relic, where can it be so easy for something to happen? There is no danger in the Holy Gold Realm, it's just a small insect that has entered the two Dark Sacred Realms, it's not a threat!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor said with a smile.

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor was not at ease, nor did he refute, but waited here silently.

The Holy Gold Realm was built by the ancestors, so what happened, they couldn't spy on it, they couldn't deduce, they could only wait for those geniuses to come out.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

On this day, the Holy Gold Realm was about to close.

Whoa!!!

One genius after another came out of the Holy Gold Realm.

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor continued to investigate the geniuses that came out, but he never found his son, the Black Pupil Holy Son.

Soon, almost all the geniuses came out.

"Four Less Blessed !!"

All the Supreme Domain Ancestors were shocked in their hearts.

This is a big deal!

"What about my son?"

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor stared at the Holy Endowments who came out and asked.

He suspected that these saints had joined forces to kill his son, otherwise his son would not have been able to get out.

At this time, a saint-endowed person spoke: "I have seen the Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor, the Black Pupil Holy Son has fallen, and the Blue Dream Holy Son, the Mullet Holy Son, and the Ancient Blood Holy Son have also fallen, it is the hand of a Holy Endowment from the Dark Sacred Domain, the strength of the other party is too strong, and many of our Holy Endowments are not opponents together." The Black Pupil Holy Son even used the Black Sky Armor and the Blood Devouring Wood Spear, but he couldn't help the other party and was killed by the other party! If we hadn't escaped quickly, I'm afraid we would have fallen!"

"It's impossible to !!!"

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor didn't believe it.

Once the Blood-Devouring Wood Spear is used, the One Realm Saint Endowment will be unstoppable, and he will definitely die!

But when the other saints said so, he had to believe it.

"Damn !!!"

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor was furious.

He was angry not only at the fall of his son, but also at the loss of the Imperial Ancestor!!!

This time, he lost too much!
